query:
SELECT
            id                                  AS "id!",
            context_id                          AS "context_id?",
            trace_id                            AS "trace_id?",
            model                               AS "model!",
            status                              AS "status!",
            latency_ms                          AS "latency_ms?",
            cost_microdollars                   AS "cost_microdollars!",
            created_at                          AS "created_at!"
        FROM ai_requests
        WHERE session_id = $1
        ORDER BY created_at DESC
        LIMIT 200
